headline: Packaging Corporation of America Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
summary: LAKE FOREST, Ill., July 22, 2026--Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE: PKG) today reported second quarter 2026 net income of $192 million, or $2.15 per share, and net income of $210 million, or $2.35 per share, excluding special items. Second quarter net sales were $2.5 billion in 2026 and $2.2 billion in 2025.
